SLOT rmhConfigProperties
    INSERT {
        property ~&6503679477&~ rmhNewNotebookDateNameHack: ~&6504329801&~
    }
END SLOT

SLOT rmhConfigAliases
    INSERT {
        property ~&214620122227&~ rmhNewNotebookDateNameHack: ~&7083272960857&~.rmhNewNotebookDateNameHack
    }
END SLOT

SLOT rmhSettingsDocumentsModel
    INSERT {
        {
           ~&214632764553&~: "Set new notebook name as current date",
           ~&478136262235079021&~: "The default name for a newly created notebook is set to the current date in the format 'yyyy-mm-dd_hhmmss'",
           ~&233723734822480&~: ~&7082020628281&~.rmhNewNotebookDateNameHack,
           ~&7082453764199&~: () => { ~&7082020628281&~.rmhNewNotebookDateNameHack = !~&7082020628281&~.rmhNewNotebookDateNameHack },
        },
    }
END SLOT

AFFECT [[16344100773210839301]]
    TRAVERSE [[7711468349764991]] > [[2838613471962460958]]:[[477062473974076915]]
        REBUILD [[15793094956877606249]]
            LOCATE BEFORE ALL
            INSERT { ~&7082020628281&~.rmhNewNotebookDateNameHack ? ~&233694067165438&~.~&3147447785264900239&~(~&7082020628281&~.newFilename()) : }
        END REBUILD
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
